theory.intro: To multiply by a 2-digit number, partition **both** numbers by place value (the area model gives four part-products) or use the standard algorithm.
facts: The area model for $2 \times 2$ digits gives **four** part-products.
The algorithm multiplies by the ones, then the tens (shifted one place), then adds.
steps: Split each number into tens and ones.
Multiply every part of one by every part of the other.
Add all the part-products for the total.
